## Checklist

- [ ] This pull request is focused on one concern.
- [ ] Accessibility and offline behavior are preserved.
- [ ] Documentation is updated where needed.
- [ ] Notable changes are recorded under `Unreleased` in `CHANGELOG.md`.
- [ ] No generated files, binaries, credentials, or personal data are included.
